case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION VS. SIDNEY TAYLOR

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, SIDNEY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-04-2003

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-29-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-19-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $155.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, SIDNEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, SIDNEY $8,622.22 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,570.52 INTEREST, $155.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,548.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
